form.label: PonyPoll Analytics
form.description: Same metrics as the Pony Poll Analytics tab — filter by time and session, then open any panel in Search for further analysis.

search.query: `ponypoll_index` sourcetype=ponypoll_attempt | stats first(quiz_name) as quiz_name by quiz_id | eval label=if(isnotnull(quiz_name) AND quiz_name!="", quiz_name, quiz_id) | fields quiz_id label | sort label
`ponypoll_index` sourcetype=ponypoll_answer session_name=* | stats max(_time) as last_event by session_name | sort -last_event | fields session_name

`ponypoll_index` sourcetype=ponypoll_attempt event=quiz_complete ($quiz_tok$="*" OR quiz_id="$quiz_tok$") ($session_tok$="*" OR session_name="$session_tok$") ($nickname_tok$="*" OR nickname="$nickname_tok$") | stats count

`ponypoll_index` sourcetype=ponypoll_attempt event=quiz_complete ($quiz_tok$="*" OR quiz_id="$quiz_tok$") ($session_tok$="*" OR session_name="$session_tok$") ($nickname_tok$="*" OR nickname="$nickname_tok$") | stats dc(nickname) as players

`ponypoll_index` sourcetype=ponypoll_attempt event=quiz_complete ($quiz_tok$="*" OR quiz_id="$quiz_tok$") ($session_tok$="*" OR session_name="$session_tok$") ($nickname_tok$="*" OR nickname="$nickname_tok$") | stats avg(total_score) as avg_score | eval avg_score=round(avg_score,0)

`ponypoll_index` sourcetype=ponypoll_attempt event=quiz_complete ($quiz_tok$="*" OR quiz_id="$quiz_tok$") ($session_tok$="*" OR session_name="$session_tok$") ($nickname_tok$="*" OR nickname="$nickname_tok$") | stats max(total_score) as top_score

`ponypoll_index` sourcetype=ponypoll_answer ($quiz_tok$="*" OR quiz_id="$quiz_tok$") ($session_tok$="*" OR session_name="$session_tok$") ($nickname_tok$="*" OR nickname="$nickname_tok$") | stats count

`ponypoll_index` sourcetype=ponypoll_attempt event=quiz_complete ($quiz_tok$="*" OR quiz_id="$quiz_tok$") ($session_tok$="*" OR session_name="$session_tok$") ($nickname_tok$="*" OR nickname="$nickname_tok$") | stats max(total_score) as best_score count as runs by nickname | sort -best_score | head 20 | streamstats count as rank | eval "#"=case(rank==1,"🥇", rank==2,"🥈", rank==3,"🥉", true(),tostring(rank)) | rename nickname as Player, best_score as "Best score", runs as Runs | table "#" Player "Best score" Runs

`ponypoll_index` sourcetype=ponypoll_answer ($quiz_tok$="*" OR quiz_id="$quiz_tok$") ($session_tok$="*" OR session_name="$session_tok$") ($nickname_tok$="*" OR nickname="$nickname_tok$") | eval correct_int=if(correct="true",1,0) | stats count as Total sum(correct_int) as Correct sum(points) as Pts by question | eval Wrong=Total-Correct | eval pct_correct=round(Correct/Total*100,1) | eval avg_pts=round(Pts/Total,0) | rename question as Question, pct_correct as "% Correct", avg_pts as "Avg pts" | table Question "% Correct" Correct Wrong "Avg pts" | sort "% Correct"

`ponypoll_index` sourcetype=ponypoll_attempt ($quiz_tok$="*" OR quiz_id="$quiz_tok$") ($session_tok$="*" OR session_name="$session_tok$") ($nickname_tok$="*" OR nickname="$nickname_tok$") | sort - _time | head 50 | eval Time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | eval Score=if(isnotnull(total_score),total_score,"—") | rename nickname as Player, session_name as Session, quiz_name as Quiz, question_count as Questions, event as Event | table Time Player Session Quiz Event Score Questions
